## Analyzers (1)

### ForcepointWebsensePing `v1.0`
Use ForcepointWebsensePing to determine which category a certain URL is assigned to.

- **Author:** Andrea Garavaglia, Davide Arcuri - LDO-CERT
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `url`, `ip`, `domain`, `fqdn`
- **Configuration:** [View config](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/ForcepointWebsensePing/ForcepointWebsensePing.json)
